2391870.name: MareQuest: An Interactive Tail
2391870.description:
New Game: MareQuest: The Filly Fiasco

A few years after the events of the Mane Story, the Alicorn mare rulers are mysteriously turned into fillies! To further add to the confusion, the day keeps repeating and it seems no other mares are aware of it. Can you solve the puzzle and save MareQuestria?

A brand new game within a game, MareQuest: The Filly Fiasco is an RPG point and click adventure which adds completely new mechanics, fun, and plenty of new friends to your favorite mare themed universe!

Level up!

8 unique skills to train! With Alchemy, Astronomy, Magic, Speechcraft, Translation, Foraging, Reading, and Time Management you'll be maremaxxing in no time!

Minigames!

Sort some apples or scrolls, practice your magical aim at targets, make potions, study the stars, and much more! We truly are mare gaming with this one!

Challenging puzzles!

Prove how big your mare brain is by solving conundrums! Learn an ancient mare language, unlock helpful Celestial Chests, stir up the right alchemic brews, and use your knowledge from the previous days to unravel the mystery!

RMG!

Random Mare Generator! Each play-through is unique! Locations, ingredients, puzzles, dialogue, and of course adorable mares will be distinctive with every new game! Be sure to take screenshots of your new friends and their MareQuest signature silly names!

Familiar faces!

If you have a good ending from the Mane Story, viewable in the Mare Gallery, you'll be able to load your character into MareQuest: The Filly Fiasco! Continue your Tail and fulfill your mare destiny!

Original Game: MareQuest: An Interactive Tail

A terrible darkness threatens a world of overwhelmingly adorable mares. Can a new cute mare with amnesia save the world or will she lose more than her memories along the way?

The second installment in the critically acclaimed MareQuest series, MareQuest: An Interactive Tail aims to combine a story rich visual novel with procedural RPG elements and more mares than you could ever hope to imagine. What more could you possibly want?

Riveting Story!

You'll be on the edge of your seat waiting to see what happens next with your favorite mares! You'll experience laughs and tears and feelings you didn't even know you were capable of having.

Choices Matter!

Tons of mare choices that will affect your games outcome! Be a good mare! Be an evil mare! Be a boring mare! The possibilities are like... Endless!

Infinite Mares!

There are just so many mares. They are all so wonderful and unique and special. The main characters in the story are always one of a kind!

Friends!

Mare friends will always love you. Will you choose to love them too?

Objectives

-Create and customize your own mare
-Meet cute and funny mares
-Talk to cute and funny mares
-Make friends with mares
-Cheer up sad mares
-Learn about an enthralling mare world
-Save all of maredom!
-Listen to a great original mare soundtrack
-Mare mare mare mare mare mare mares. I love them!
